questions.question: What fraction of declared structural course-object references in the current public GetCourse, Skillspace, and Stepik starter fixtures are materialized by their adapters?

population.subject: structural course-object references declared by the canonical public GetCourse, Skillspace, and Stepik starter fixtures
population.definition: one unique platform-scoped lesson reference visible in a current browser fixture course index, or one unique Stepik section, unit, lesson, or step reference in the current starter API-tree fixture
population.inclusion_rule: every valid unique structural reference in all three canonical public starter fixtures when each adapter reports an exhausted source inventory
population.exclusion_rule: course text, progress, assets, transcripts, assignments, discussions, topics, entities, optional Stepik step-source enrichment, catalog duplicates, private or live source content, normalized indexes, graph or evidence objects, eval outcomes, readiness, and runtime state

measurements.authority_ceiling: Reports only the ratio of materialized structural references in the three canonical public starter fixtures at one source revision; it does not establish content completeness or adequacy, live-source coverage, identity continuity, normalized corpus integrity, index or graph coverage, retrieval or answer quality, connector readiness, eval success, proof verdicts, or runtime health.
